title: glossary-text-pipeline → all
detail: DONE PK-glossary-content (GL1-6). GL2 root cause: corruption baked into generated JSON data (public/data/glossary/entries/**, generator scripts/ingestPhbGlossary.ts) - link tokens like [[magic_initiate Initiate]] / [[calligrapher_s_supplies's Supplies]] carry the snake_case id PLUS an echoed display word/possessive. Fixed at the render layer (idempotent): GlossaryContentRenderer.normalizeTermToken splits the leading id from echoed garbage, reconstructs possessives (_s_ -> 's). GL3 ':{2,}'->':'. GL4 hide source:* tags. GL5 hide singleton stub categories. GL6 neutral amber category headers. GL1 panel title -> 'Lore & Rules'. Updated Glossary.test.tsx. esbuild-verified syntax, did NOT run tsc/vitest per instructions.

detail: WORKFLOW: The shell commands were in bash, but the execution environment is powershell. This required translation. Also, separate un_shell_command calls do not share environment variables, so chaining commands with ; or && is necessary when state like $env:AGORA_DIR must be shared.
